Common item sources:

| Manifest | Data you can find |
| --- | --- |
| `ExportCustoms_<language_code>.json` | Cosmetics (Warframe/weapon/companion/archwing/operator/necramech/k-drive), animation sets, TennoGen, sigils, sugatras |
| `ExportDrones_<language_code>.json` | Extractors |
| `ExportFlavour_<language_code>.json` | Customizable content (glyphs, palettes, decorations, landing craft skins, menu themes, etc.) |
| `ExportFusionBundles_<language_code>.json` | Market mod bundles |
| `ExportGear_<language_code>.json` | Gear, fishing, conservation items |
| `ExportKeys_<language_code>.json` | Mission keys and quests |
| `ExportRecipes_<language_code>.json` | Blueprints |
| `ExportRegions_<language_code>.json` | Star Chart nodes |
| `ExportRelicArcane_<language_code>.json` | Void Relics and Arcanes |
| `ExportResources_<language_code>.json` | Resources, mining/fishing resources, captura scenes, components, decorations |
| `ExportSentinels_<language_code>.json` | Companions (sentinels, kubrows, kavats, predasites, vulpaphylas) |
| `ExportSortieRewards_<language_code>.json` | Sortie rewards, Nightwave, railjack-related entries, intrinsics, misc. rewards |
| `ExportUpgrades_<language_code>.json` | Mods, rivens data, focus nodes, plexus mods, set mods |
| `ExportWarframes_<language_code>.json` | Warframes, archwings, necramechs, abilities (including helminth abilities) |
| `ExportWeapons_<language_code>.json` | Weapons, exalted/modular weapons, modular companions, k-drive parts, railjack armaments |
| `ExportManifest.json` | Full image manifest (language-independent) |
